hero.sub: A workshop isn't just another class. It's an intentional gathering where Lucie combines the hypopressive method with other approaches — for deeper experience, new perspectives, and a different kind of practice.

events.intro: Each project is a unique collaboration between Lucie and another expert — with its own approach, rhythm, and theme. Pick the one that speaks to you.
events.noEventsText: No upcoming dates are currently scheduled. New ones coming soon.

practical.subtitle: Everything you need to know before booking.

price.noteHtml:
Payment after your place is confirmed.
Gift vouchers available.

included.title: What's included
items: The energy and synergy of the group
Time to slow down and be with yourself

bring.title: What to bring
items: Don't eat 2 hours before the workshop
Water and mats are provided at the studio
For outdoor or salt cave sessions: bring your own mat and water
We practice barefoot — comfy shoes for outdoor venues

storno.title: Cancellation policy
storno.intro: Life sometimes gets in the way — we get it. To keep the workshop a quality experience for the whole group, we stick to a few simple rules.
storno.note: You can always send someone in your place. If we cancel the workshop from our side (e.g., low attendance), we'll offer an alternative date or a full refund.

archive.emptyHtml:
Workshops are just beginning — the first takes place April 26, 2026.
After each gathering, recaps and photos will appear here.

contact.sub: Write or call — Lucie replies personally.

brunch.body: After the workshop, a shared brunch and coffee await you at the venue. It's part of the experience — time to pause, chat, and gently close the whole gathering.
itemsHtml: ✦ Warm and cold brunch (sweet and savory options)
✦ Everything included in the workshop price
brunch.footnote: Please let us know in advance about any allergies or dietary preferences.

guides.name: Lucie Linková
guides.bio: Conscious work with intra-abdominal pressure, the diaphragm, and pelvic floor. Lucie guides you through a technique that activates your deep stabilizing system — no force, no strain. Your body learns to function more efficiently through breath and posture.

guides.name: Katka
guides.bio: Pranayama is an ancient yogic practice of conscious breathwork — a direct entry into the nervous system. Through extended exhalation, breath retention, and alternate nostril breathing, Katka calms the mind, regulates stress, and deepens body awareness.

locationInfo.body: Morning calm, fresh air, blooming greenery… paired with gentle movement that wakes you up.
The salt cave naturally supports the respiratory system, calms the body, and helps release tension. The mineral-rich microclimate can strengthen immunity, improve breathing, and bring overall calm.
